overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character journeying through a snowy mountainous landscape. Starting from a grave site, the character walks through deep snow past rocky outcrops, crosses a frozen valley with a wooden bridge, and climbs a steep slope toward a mountain ridge in heavy fog and snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy grave site in mountain pass

events.description: character stands up from grave and begins walking away from the burial site

agents.ego_description: character stands at a snowy grave site near an open coffin, then turns and begins walking away

entered.detail: weathered wooden tombstone with red markings standing upright in snow
open wooden coffin partially buried in snow
wooden shovel stuck upright in the snow near the grave
dark rocky outcrop covered in snow
deep snow covering the mountain ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a snowy grave site marked by a wooden tombstone and an open coffin. The character stands near the grave in a narrow mountain pass surrounded by rocky cliffs and deep snow before beginning to walk away.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain path between rocky outcrops

events.description: leaves the grave site and enters open mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snowy mountain path between rock formations, descending slightly

entered.detail: snow-covered rocky slope rising on the left side
dense cluster of pine trees visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the grave site along a snowy mountain path. Rocky outcrops line both sides of the trail as the character descends toward a distant forested valley, with the grave site disappearing behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy valley with frozen creek and wooden bridge

events.description: descends into valley revealing frozen creek and wooden bridge crossing
turns slightly to approach the bridge crossing

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow toward a wooden bridge spanning a frozen creek

entered.detail: wooden footbridge crossing over the frozen waterway
snow-covered frozen stream running through the valley
tall pine tree heavy with snow on its branches

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide snowy valley featuring a frozen creek and a wooden bridge in the distance. Snow-covered pine trees dot the landscape as the character approaches the water crossing, with rocky cliffs visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered valley floor with scattered pine trees

events.description: passes the bridge and enters the forested valley section

agents.ego_description: walking through the valley among scattered snow-laden pine trees

entered.detail: snow-laden pine tree on the left side of the path
large rocky formation visible on the distant left slope

segments.scene_description: Moving through the valley floor, the character walks among scattered snow-laden pine trees. The terrain is relatively flat with rocky outcrops visible on the distant slopes, having left the frozen creek and bridge behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snowy mountain slope leading to rocky ridge

events.description: begins ascending steep snowy slope toward mountain ridge
reaches rocky ridge at the top of the slope

agents.ego_description: climbing a steep snow-covered slope toward a rocky mountain ridge

entered.detail: steep incline of deep snow requiring climb
rocky mountain ridge at the top of the slope

segments.scene_description: The character begins a steep ascent up a snow-covered mountain slope toward a rocky ridge. The climb is arduous through deep snow, with visibility limited by the heavy fog and falling snow, leaving the valley trees behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a desolate mountain grave and ascends through a frozen valley into a blinding alpine fog. It begins at a snowy grave site marked by a wooden tombstone and an open coffin, following the character as they walk away from the narrow pass and descend between rocky outcrops. As the path opens, the scene expands into a wide snowy valley where the camera tracks the character past a frozen creek and a wooden bridge toward scattered, snow-laden pine trees. The terrain then shifts from the flat valley floor to a steep, arduous climb up a snow-covered mountain slope. Finally, the landscape transforms into a stark, rocky ridge as visibility fades into heavy fog and falling snow.
